jobs.title: Application Engineer – critical power
jobs.description:
We are looking for a motivated and technically strong Application Engineer for critical power systems. In this role, you

will support our Sales team by designing and configuring UPS and power protection solutions, providing technical

guidance to customers, and coordinating closely with internal teams throughout the project lifecycle from tender to

implementation.

You will be involved from early pre-sales discussions through quotation, project execution, and post-sales support,

contributing directly to customer satisfaction and the growth of Centiel’s global Data Center business.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel

Reporting to: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power

descriptionByLocale.en:
We are looking for a motivated and technically strong Application Engineer for critical power systems. In this role, you

will support our Sales team by designing and configuring UPS and power protection solutions, providing technical

guidance to customers, and coordinating closely with internal teams throughout the project lifecycle from tender to

implementation.

You will be involved from early pre-sales discussions through quotation, project execution, and post-sales support,

contributing directly to customer satisfaction and the growth of Centiel’s global Data Center business.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel

Reporting to: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power
descriptionByLocale.it: Cerchiamo un ingegnere applicativo motivato e tecnicamente forte per sistemi energetici critici. In questo ruolo, supporterai il nostro team di vendita progettando e configurando soluzioni UPS e di protezione dell'alimentazione, fornendo assistenza tecnica ai clienti e coordinandoti da vicino con i team interni durante l'intero ciclo di vita del progetto, dalla gara all'implementazione. Sarai coinvolto dalle prime discussioni pre-vendita fino al preventivo, all'esecuzione del progetto e al supporto post-vendita, contribuendo direttamente alla soddisfazione del cliente e alla crescita del business globale dei data center di Centiel. Luogo di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), con trasferte occasionali. Riporto a: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power
descriptionByLocale.de: Wir suchen einen motivierten und technisch versierten Anwendungsingenieur für kritische Energiesysteme. In dieser Rolle unterstützen Sie unser Vertriebsteam, indem Sie USV- und Stromschutzlösungen entwerfen und konfigurieren, Kunden technische Beratung bieten und sich während des gesamten Projektlebenszyklus von der Ausschreibung bis zur Implementierung eng mit internen Teams abstimmen. Sie sind von den ersten Vorverkaufsgesprächen über die Angebotserstellung bis hin zur Projektdurchführung und dem Post-Sales-Support eingebunden und tragen so direkt zur Kundenzufriedenheit und zum Wachstum des globalen Rechenzentrumsgeschäfts von Centiel bei. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), mit gelegentlichen Reisen. Bericht an: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power
descriptionByLocale.fr: Nous recherchons un ingénieur d'application motivé et techniquement solide pour les systèmes électriques critiques. Dans ce rôle, vous soutiendrez notre équipe commerciale en concevant et en configurant des solutions d'onduleurs et de protection électrique, en fournissant des conseils techniques aux clients et en vous coordonnant étroitement avec les équipes internes tout au long du cycle de vie du projet, de l'appel d'offres à la mise en œuvre. Vous serez impliqué dès les premières discussions avant-vente jusqu’au devis, à l’exécution du projet et au support après-vente, contribuant directement à la satisfaction du client et à la croissance de l’activité mondiale des centres de données de Centiel. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), avec déplacements occasionnels Relevant de : VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power

jobs.title: Research & Development Engineer
jobs.description:
To strengthen our product innovation, we are seeking a Research & Development Engineer with solid expertise in power electronics control and embedded systems for high-reliability industrial products (UPS or similar).

You are a hands-on engineer with strong analytical skills and lab practice, able to design, implement, and validate control algorithms and embedded firmware/hardware, collaborating closely with Production, Quality, and After-Sales to deliver robust features to market.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel

Reporting to: Head of R&D

Working rate: 100%

descriptionByLocale.en:
To strengthen our product innovation, we are seeking a Research & Development Engineer with solid expertise in power electronics control and embedded systems for high-reliability industrial products (UPS or similar).

You are a hands-on engineer with strong analytical skills and lab practice, able to design, implement, and validate control algorithms and embedded firmware/hardware, collaborating closely with Production, Quality, and After-Sales to deliver robust features to market.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel

Reporting to: Head of R&D

Working rate: 100%
descriptionByLocale.it: Per rafforzare la nostra innovazione di prodotto, cerchiamo un ingegnere di ricerca e sviluppo con solida esperienza nel controllo dell'elettronica di potenza e nei sistemi embedded per prodotti industriali ad alta affidabilità (UPS o simili). Sei un ingegnere pratico con forti capacità analitiche e pratica di laboratorio, in grado di progettare, implementare e convalidare algoritmi di controllo e firmware/hardware integrati, collaborando a stretto contatto con produzione, qualità e post-vendita per fornire funzionalità robuste al mercato. Sede di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), con trasferte occasionali Riporto a: Responsabile R&D Orario di lavoro: 100%
descriptionByLocale.de: Um unsere Produktinnovation zu stärken, suchen wir einen Forschungs- und Entwicklungsingenieur mit fundiertem Fachwissen in der Leistungselektroniksteuerung und eingebetteten Systemen für hochzuverlässige Industrieprodukte (USV oder ähnliches). Sie sind ein praxisorientierter Ingenieur mit ausgeprägten analytischen Fähigkeiten und Laborpraxis, der in der Lage ist, Steueralgorithmen und eingebettete Firmware/Hardware zu entwerfen, zu implementieren und zu validieren und eng mit Produktion, Qualität und Kundendienst zusammenzuarbeiten, um robuste Funktionen auf den Markt zu bringen. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), mit gelegentlichen Reisen. Bericht an: Leiter F&E. Arbeitsquote: 100 %.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Pour renforcer notre innovation produits, nous recherchons un Ingénieur Recherche & Développement possédant une solide expertise en contrôle électronique de puissance et systèmes embarqués pour produits industriels à haute fiabilité (UPS ou similaire). Vous êtes un ingénieur pratique doté de solides compétences analytiques et d'une pratique de laboratoire, capable de concevoir, de mettre en œuvre et de valider des algorithmes de contrôle et des micrologiciels/matériels intégrés, en collaborant étroitement avec la production, la qualité et le service après-vente pour proposer des fonctionnalités robustes sur le marché. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), avec déplacements occasionnels Relève du : Responsable R&D Taux de travail : 100%

jobs.title: Sales – 3-phase UPS Channel Partners Manager
jobs.description:
To support our global expansion, we are seeking a Sales– 3-phase UPS Channel Partners Manager with a proven background in B2B channel management and a strong understanding of the 3-phase UPS and power protection market. The ideal candidate combines commercial acumen, relationship-building skills, and technical insight to drive growth through our international network of distributors and resellers.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), Switzerland

Reporting to: Global Sales Director

Working rate: 100%

titleByLocale.it: Vendite – Responsabile dei partner di canale UPS trifase
titleByLocale.fr: Ventes – Responsable des partenaires de distribution UPS triphasé

descriptionByLocale.en:
To support our global expansion, we are seeking a Sales– 3-phase UPS Channel Partners Manager with a proven background in B2B channel management and a strong understanding of the 3-phase UPS and power protection market. The ideal candidate combines commercial acumen, relationship-building skills, and technical insight to drive growth through our international network of distributors and resellers.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), Switzerland

Reporting to: Global Sales Director

Working rate: 100%
descriptionByLocale.it: Per supportare la nostra espansione globale, stiamo cercando un responsabile dei partner di canale UPS trifase con un comprovato background nella gestione dei canali B2B e una forte conoscenza del mercato degli UPS trifase e della protezione dell'alimentazione. Il candidato ideale combina acume commerciale, capacità di costruzione di relazioni e intuizioni tecniche per guidare la crescita attraverso la nostra rete internazionale di distributori e rivenditori. Luogo di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), Svizzera A riporto di: Global Sales Director Tasso di lavoro: 100%
descriptionByLocale.de: Um unsere globale Expansion zu unterstützen, suchen wir einen Vertriebs- 3-phasigen UPS Channel Partners Manager mit einem nachgewiesenen Hintergrund im B2B-Channel-Management und einem starken Verständnis des 3-phasigen UPS- und Stromschutzmarktes. Der ideale Kandidat kombiniert Geschäftssinn, Fähigkeiten zum Aufbau von Beziehungen und technische Erkenntnisse, um das Wachstum durch unser internationales Netzwerk von Distributoren und Wiederverkäufern voranzutreiben. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), Schweiz Berichterstattung an: Global Sales Director Arbeitspreis: 100%
descriptionByLocale.fr: Pour soutenir notre expansion mondiale, nous recherchons un responsable des partenaires de distribution UPS en 3 phases avec une expérience éprouvée dans la gestion des canaux B2B et une solide compréhension du marché DES onduleurs en 3 phases et de la protection de l'alimentation. Le candidat idéal combine la perspicacité commerciale, les compétences d'établissement de relations et la perspicacité technique pour stimuler la croissance à travers notre réseau international de distributeurs et de revendeurs. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), Suisse Relevant de : Directeur des ventes mondiales Taux de travail : 100 %

jobs.title: After-Sales Technician
jobs.description:
To support our growth and strengthen our After-Sales

department, we are seeking a motivated and skilled

after-sales technician with a strong technical background

and a customer-centric mindset.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), Switzerland

Reporting to: After Sales Manager

descriptionByLocale.en:
To support our growth and strengthen our After-Sales

department, we are seeking a motivated and skilled

after-sales technician with a strong technical background

and a customer-centric mindset.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), Switzerland

Reporting to: After Sales Manager
descriptionByLocale.it:
## After-Sales Technician

**Centiel** — Cadro (Lugano) (TI)

To support our growth and strengthen our After-Sales

department, we are seeking a motivated and skilled

after-sales technician with a strong technical background

and a customer-centric mindset.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), Switzerland

Reporting to: After Sales Manager

Centiel è un'azienda svizzera specializzata nella progettazione e produzione di sistemi di alimentazione ininterrotta (UPS) ad alta efficienza. Con sede in Ticino, sviluppiamo soluzioni tecnologiche all'avanguardia per data center, ospedali, infrastrutture critiche e industria.

Offriamo un ambiente innovativo, progetti tecnologici sfidanti e condizioni d'impiego competitive.
descriptionByLocale.de: Um unser Wachstum zu unterstützen und unsere After-Sales-Abteilung zu stärken, suchen wir einen motivierten und qualifizierten After-Sales-Techniker mit einem starken technischen Hintergrund und einer kundenorientierten Denkweise. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), Schweiz Berichterstattung an: After Sales Manager
descriptionByLocale.fr: Pour accompagner notre croissance et renforcer notre service après-vente, nous recherchons un technicien après-vente motivé et compétent, doté d'une solide expérience technique et d'un état d'esprit centré sur le client. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), Suisse Relevant de : Responsable après-vente
